cards.back: The structure of the IoT system, including devices, gateways, clouds, and applications.
The process of managing and monitoring IoT devices, including firmware updates, configuration, and data analytics.
The protection of IoT devices and data from unauthorized access, tampering, and cyber threats.
The process of analyzing and extracting insights from large amounts of data generated by IoT devices.
A low-power, low-data-rate wireless networking technology used to connect IoT devices.
